responsiblePerson: RETRAINNING REGARDING AMBULANCE AND FACILITY AVAILBILITY

description: WHILE UPDATING STAFF'S ACCOUNT DETAILS MISTAKENLY ENTERED THE DETAILS BASED ON THE PREVIOUS JOB INFORMATION INSTEAD OF CURRENT DETAILS . MISKTAKE WAS UNINTENTIONAL AND OCCURED DUE TO OVERSIGHT DURING THE DATA ENTRY PROCESS . THE DISCREPANCY HAS BEEN IDENTIFIED AND NECESSARY CORRECTIVE ACTION IS TAKEN
rootCause: INCIDENT OCCURED DUE TO HUMAN ERROR DURING THE DATA ENTRY PROCESS , WHERE PREVIOUS JOB DETAILS OF THE STAFF MEMBER WERE MISTAKENLY REFFERED TO AND ENTERED INTO THE ACCOUNT INSTEAD OF THE CURRENT INFORMATION , LACK OF PROPER VEDRIFICATION , CROSS CHECKING BEFORE FINAL SUBMISSION. METHOD OF GIVING DETAILS TO HR WITH TIMMING WAS IMPROPER.
immediateAction: THE DISCRIPANCY IDENTIFIED AND REVIEWD IMMEDIATELY AND THE INCORRECT DETAILS ENTERED IN THE STAFF ACCOUNT WERE CORRECTED BY UPDATING THE ACCURATE AND CURRENT INFORMATION AFTER PROPER VERIFICATION.
actionTaken: PROPER VERIFICATION AND CROSS CHECKING OF STAFF DETAILS WILL BE ENSURED BEFORE FINAL SUBMISSION OF ACCOUNTS. ADDITIONAL ATTENTION WILL BE GIVEN DURING ENTERING TO AVOID REFERRING TO INCORRECT INFORMATION . CAPA DETSAILS - 11 TO 20 OF MONTH PROPER REASON AND DETAILS WITH EMPLOYE SIGN
